title: Better SASSOT Combat Data Pack
description: The required data pack for full integration of SASSOT (Spears, Axes, Swords, Shields, and Other Tools) with Better Combat.
body:
![Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/a92DCuIA/images/61ff14a50b6c7b0d061fea071e7a708d3e7e9320.png)

**As of [SASSOT](https://modrinth.com/mod/sassot) v1.1.3-1.20.1+bettercombat, this data pack is now built-in during World creation by default.** 

**Older Worlds still require manual installation.**

This additional data pack is required to properly play [**SASSOT**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sassot) together with [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat). 

This small data pack modifies Vanilla weapon attack ranges according to SASSOT mechanics on top of Better Combat. **Without it, vanilla swords and tridents will not receive SASSOT's extended attack reach.**

Upon installing the above mods, please also download this data pack and install it into your worlds.
